reviews.comment:
Los playeros muy buena atención como siempre. Los baños impecables. Lo que no me gusto es la atención y los precios de shop. Me parecieron un poco exagerados

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were very helpful as always. The restrooms were spotless. What I didn't like was the service and the prices at the shop. I thought they were a bit excessive.

reviews.comment:
La estación de servicio tiene amplio lugar para estacionar. El shop tiene solo 4 meses , por lo cual en temporada se llena rápido. Precios acordes . Le falta un poco de variedad

(Translated by Google)
The gas station has ample parking. The shop is only four months old, so it fills up quickly during peak season. Prices are reasonable. It lacks a bit of variety.
